question: Did the model determine the lever arm of the effort force F to be 60 cm?
Did the model calculate the magnitude of the effort force F to be 100 N?
Did the model calculate the minimum effort force required to be 50 N?
Did the model conclude that placing heavier items closer to point O causes the minimum effort force to 'decrease'?
Did the model correctly identify the resistance arm as OC (24 cm) and the load as the suitcase weight (250 N)?
Did the model explicitly apply the Lever Equilibrium Condition (Effort × Effort Arm = Resistance × Resistance Arm) or Torque Balance equation?
Did the model correctly calculate the lever arm of F using trigonometry (specifically OA × sin(30°))?
Did the model correctly reason that to minimize the effort force, the effort arm must be maximized (i.e., force perpendicular to the handle OA)?
Did the model correctly identify that the maximum possible effort arm is the length of the handle OA (120 cm)?
Did the model correctly explain that moving items closer to the fulcrum O reduces the resistance arm (horizontal distance from center of gravity to fulcrum), thereby reducing the required force?
Are the generated diagrams visually clear, with recognizable components (suitcase, handle) and legible labels?
In the diagram for Part 1, is the lever arm of force F depicted as the perpendicular line segment from the fulcrum O to the line of action of F (or its extension)?
In the diagram for Part 1, is the 30° angle correctly positioned between the force vector F and the handle OA?
In the diagram for Part 2, is the minimum effort force vector drawn perpendicular (approximately 90°) to the handle OA?
Are gravity/weight vectors in the diagrams depicted acting vertically downward?
Are the labels for key points (O, A, B, C) consistent across all generated images?
If the text describes constructing an auxiliary line (e.g., perpendicular from O), does the corresponding image show this geometric construction?
If the text states that the minimum effort force is perpendicular to the handle, does the visual representation of that force vector align with this description?
Does the depiction of the fulcrum O and center of gravity in the images align with their descriptions in the text?
